name: run-anyt-notebook-openclaw
description: Run AnyT Notebook (.anyt.md) files as the coding agent — execute task cells directly instead of spawning sub-agents. For OpenClaw and similar external agents.
author: Bin Sheng <supercarl87@gmail.com>
capabilities: Run AnyT notebooks cell-by-cell as the coding agent
Execute task cells directly without spawning sub-agents
Handle shell, input, break, and note cells via CLI
Write completion markers and summaries for task cells
